# VisExpert Web Demo

Local web demo for case-study comparisons (Three.js outputs across different LLMs).

## Run

```bash
cd /home/jiarong/VisExpert/webdemo
python -m http.server 8000
```

Then open:

- `http://localhost:8000/`

## Dataset showcase GIF

- Grid GIF (25 videos, 5×5): `assets/dataset_showcase/dataset_showcase_25_5x5.gif`
- Selected source videos: `assets/dataset_showcase/selected_videos.txt`
